ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone preparing to eat a sandwich.  It starts with both arms relaxed, then moves to a position of holding the sandwich, and finally to a position of bringing it to the mouth.  The robot does not have hands, so the motion implies holding and eating. The slight outward rotation in joint1 creates a more natural posture. Frame 1 is the neutral position. Frame 2 shows both arms moving up to grasp the sandwich, slightly inward at the shoulders. Frame 3 shows the sandwich being lifted to the mouth, and Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a relaxed position after the sandwich is (presumably) eaten.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely at the sides
arms lift slightly, ready to hold
arms bring the imaginary sandwich to the mouth
arms return to a relaxed, satisfied state
